title: Develop data-driven applications by using Azure SQL Database
summary: Learn how to develop data-driven applications by using Microsoft Azure SQL Database. DP-3020

sections.title: Develop data-driven applications by using Azure SQL Database
sections.summary: Learn how to develop data-driven applications by using Microsoft Azure SQL Database. DP-3020

lessons.title: Get started with Azure SQL Database for modern application development
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Azure SQL Database works, the key concepts, and practical examples to help developers effectively utilize Azure SQL Database in their cloud-based applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-sql-database-application-development/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Get started with Azure SQL Database for modern application development

lessons.title: Develop for Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and configure an Azure SQL Database. You'll use SQL Database Projects in VS Code, including installing the extension, importing, and modifying a schema. Additionally, you'll build and deploy database projects in GitHub Actions and Azure Pipelines, and automate and invoke the publishing of a database.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-azure-sql-database/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Develop a data API for Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create modern REST data API for Azure SQL Database. We'll delve into Data API Builder, a powerful cross-platform that simplifies the creation of endpoints for your Azure SQL Database. With features like automatic query generation, granular security controls, and seamless integration with other Azure services, the Data API Builder can effortlessly transform your database into a versatile API.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-data-api-azure-sql-database/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop a data API for Azure SQL Database

lessons.title: Explore data manipulation options in Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to invoke REST endpoints in Azure SQL Database and manipulate data using Azure Functions. Also, explore various tools and options for importing and exporting data to and from Azure SQL Database.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-data-manipulation-azure-sql-database/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore data manipulation options in Azure SQL Database

lessons.title: Explore security practices for Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn how security works in Azure SQL Database, the key concepts, and practical examples to help developers effectively utilize Azure SQL Database in their cloud-based applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-security-practices-azure-sql-database/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore security practices for Azure SQL Database

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop data-driven applications by using Azure SQL Database
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop data-driven applications by using Azure SQL Database**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
